kind.description: The kind of item this is.

totalBytesRewritten.description: The total bytes rewritten so far.

objectSize.description: The total size of the object being copied.

done.description: Whether the rewrite is complete. If false, call the rewrite method again with the returned rewriteToken.

rewriteToken.description: A token to use in subsequent rewrite requests. Present only when the rewrite is not yet complete.
